message:
feat(mux): implement CollapsePriority-aware constraint-based resize [ft-2dd4s.4]

Wire the existing CollapsePriority enum into the resize pipeline so panes
can be automatically collapsed when the terminal shrinks below aggregate
minimum constraints, and restored when it grows back.

Key changes:
- Track collapsed panes in TabInner::collapsed_panes HashSet
- Add collapse selection (Low→Normal→High) and restore (High→Normal→Low)
- Add redistribute_for_collapsed post-pass that gives freed space to siblings
- Expose public API: is_pane_collapsed, collapsed_pane_ids, compute_split_budget
- Add collapse_priority field + new_with_priority constructor to FakePane
- Add 7 tests: collapse on shrink, priority ordering, Never exemption,
  uncollapse on grow, collapsed_pane_ids API, split budget, vertical collapse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
